NOT running Prometheus
or Alertmanager" style="whiteSpace=wrap;strokeWidth=2;fontFamily=Verdana;fontSize=20;shadow=1;fillColor=#f9f7ed;strokeColor=default;" vertex="1" parent="1"> <mxGeometry x="1165.23" y="5460" width="310" height="100" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="5" value="SSH to worker" style="whiteSpace=wrap;strokeWidth=2;fontFamily=Verdana;fontSize=20;shadow=1;fillColor=#ffcc99;strokeColor=default;" vertex="1" parent="1"> <mxGeometry x="1215.23" y="5610" width="210" height="65.31" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="6" value="iptables -I INPUT

FIRING - NodeDown" style="whiteSpace=wrap;strokeWidth=2;fontFamily=Verdana;fontSize=20;shadow=1;fillColor=#ffcc99;strokeColor=default;" vertex="1" parent="1"> <mxGeometry x="786.8411867088607" y="6470.002669709071" width="240.66090189873415" height="94.32972047917855" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="11" value="See Troubleshooting:
